step_by_step_thinking:
The House-Brackmann grading scale is primarily used to evaluate the **facial nerve**. There are references across articles discussing its application in evaluating the severity of facial nerve paralysis and in documenting the functional status of the facial nerve during assessments.
\boxed{\text{A}}
```plaintext
Explanation:
The context consistently refers to the House-Brackmann grading scale being applied to evaluate the facial nerve. No mention is made of applying this scale specifically to hypoglossal, vagus, or trigeminal nerves.
```
